user.title: LX OpenSubsonic
user.description: OpenSubsonic bridge. Configure search source, music-source JS URL, and quality.

data_description.username: Account used by Music Assistant. Default: admin
data_description.password: Password used by Music Assistant. Default: password
data_description.music_source_js_url: Music source JS URL. Runtime-parsed for stream API. Do not hard-code paid keys.
data_description.preferred_quality: Preferred stream quality with fallback. Default: flac

init.title: LX OpenSubsonic options
init.description: Hot-switch search source / quality / music source JS.

data_description.music_source_js_url: Music source JS URL for stream resolution
